resources.string: With our automated reports, slice and dice your employee survey data immediately to identify your top teams and top strengths.
Get a comprehensive view of an individual with a 360 degree feedback review.
Establish a regular communication channel and get a real-time gauge on employee mood and morale.
Don’t know what to ask? Deploy a survey using our expert frameworks.

string-array.name: ms_titles
string-array.item: Understand the pulse of your organization

string-array.name: ms_texts
string-array.item: Prioritize actions quickly based on employee feedback - in real-time.
Allow employees to express how they feel.
Connect with your employees in real-time with push messaging and notifications.

resources.string: Your Workforce Company Code is the Unique Identification Number/Text for your organisation\'s Workforce account. If you don\'t have it yet, please contact your HR/Admin for the correct company code.
